title: Fallen Fruits Blue Set Of 3 Zinc Flower Pots (Assorted Colours)
features: Set of 3 Flower Pots made of zinc
Come in three sizes (small, medium, large)
Small pot measures Height 11.3 x Diameter 11cm ; Medium Pot Height 12.2cm x Diameter 12cm; Large Pot Height 12.8cm x Diameter 14cm.
description: These stunning set of 3 zinc plant pots in light blue and are frost-proof and perfect for displaying your plants, tomatoes or herbs in the patio, conservatory, garden or balcony. These planters come in three sizes. Small pot measures Height 11.3 x Diameter 11cm ; Medium Pot Height 12.2cm x Diameter 12cm; Large Pot Height 12.8cm x Diameter 14cm.
